case_title: KIL SEON OH VS. ENRIQUE CONTRERAS et al

docket_entries.description: MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-18-2012 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ENRIQUE CONTRERAS' WAIVER OF ADDITIONAL COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-03-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Kil Seon Oh is present and in Pro Per.
Defendant Enrique Contreras is present.
Attorney Supriya Molina Wunsh representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Barbara Anscher, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
The trial date of MAY-07-2012 is vacated.
